actionable_feedback: Add a clearly labeled final decision table (rows = assets A/B/C; columns = Privilege, Exposure, Findings, Data, DerivedPriority, Reason). Populate the table with the exact packet-derived values and one-line rationale for each row so reviewers can verify decisions at a glance.

Include a short reproducible validation checklist (or tiny runnable assertions) showing the exact packet-derived inputs and the checks used to derive the priority (e.g., checks for critical-rule match and findings threshold). Example: a 3-row table of checks with expected packet values and pass/fail outcomes.
Complete and expand the Uncertainty & Sensitivity section so it is not truncated: explicitly describe how tie-breaks were handled, sensitivity thresholds, and any rounding or ordering edge-cases.
Ensure the final artifact file is fully materialized (no truncation in previews). Re-run the deterministic precheck or re-upload the artifact so graders/verifiers can inspect the complete content.
Add a one-paragraph 'What changed in this revision' note at top of the report summarizing the new decision table and validation steps for quick re-review.
artifact_specific_comments: Preview of DLP_tuning_report.md (sha256:7ca8aafb15ccab307fa3e6b97a0561ca42632def53ca444f0787b5d91792e223) shows necessary sections but is truncated near the end of the Uncertainty & Sensitivity notes; the final structured decision table is not visible in the preview.
The report already contains per-asset tie-backs and an evidence-needed table, which is good; the requested decision table is an additive explicit mapping to improve quick verification.
feedback_summary: The baseline submission meets the artifact contract and is traceable to the embedded packet: packet rows are cited, intermediate calculations are shown, and a remediation order with evidence tie-backs is provided. Partial credit (0.75) was awarded due to a truncated artifact preview and the absence (in the visible preview) of a clearly labeled, structured final decision table and a concise, reproducible validation checklist. Fixing those minor gaps and ensuring the full artifact is materialized will allow full credit.
